_comment: 2026-06-17 analyze_failures 48h: dist_atr <2 = 53.3% ✅, 2-3 = 48% ❌, 3+ = 47.5% ❌ → hard cap ATR at 2.0 for both flip and continuation. bb_width 14-25 = 55.4% WR (better than 8-14 at 52.5%) → expand max to 25. flip_atr_min 1.0 correct (near-band entries best).
